title: Witness anchor requirement lacks Sapling tree semantics explanation
description: build_shielded_tx() docstring says anchor_height 'Must equal WalletStore::scan_tip()' but does not explain why. A contributor who does not know Sapling will not understand that witnesses are rooted at the scan-tip tree snapshot (incremental witness advances once per block, not per note). If someone passes a note's block_height instead of scan_tip(), the anchor check at lines 329–346 catches the mismatch, but only if notes have different heights. Single-note transactions with the wrong anchor pass the check silently and fail at the prover with a cryptic error. Add 2 sentences to the docstring explaining the incremental witness tree invariant.
close_reason: Added 2-sentence explanation of Sapling incremental witness tree semantics to build_shielded_tx docstring: witnesses advance per block (not per note), so anchor_height must equal scan_tip, not note.block_height.
